conference.name: VAD Bangkok 2026
conference.tagline: 4 High-Conviction Ideas for the Next Cycle

companies.name: F88 Investment
companies.thesis: F88 is Vietnam's leading modern alternative financing chain with over 970 branches nationwide, serving the country's large underbanked population. As financial inclusion accelerates, we expect strong loan growth, improving funding access, and technology-driven operating leverage to support sustainable ROE above 30%, positioning F88 as a key beneficiary of the formalization of Vietnam's consumer finance market.
catalysts: Large underbanked population supports loan growth.
Diversified income and MBB partnership drive growth.
HOSE listing improves funding access and reduces costs.

companies.name: Gemadept Corporation
companies.thesis: GMD is Vietnam's premier port and logistics operator, uniquely positioned to capture surging export volumes driven by supply chain diversification away from China. The Nam Dinh Vu and Gemalink terminal expansion provide visible earnings growth through 2027.
catalysts: Nam Dinh Vu Phase 3 utilization ramp up.
Gemalink expansion with capacity to at least double over next 2–3 years.

companies.name: Bluemarq Group
companies.thesis: Bluemarq Group (formerly Dat Xanh Group) is a diversified real estate developer with strong mid-market residential exposure in Ho Chi Minh City and the southern provinces. A maturing project pipeline and recovering property cycle position DXG for a meaningful earnings re-rating over 2027–28 as handover revenue ramps up.
catalysts: GSW and new project launch pipeline.
risks: Policy risk on real estate credit.

companies.name: Masan Consumer Holdings
companies.thesis: MCH is a leading FMCG manufacturer in Vietnam, with 50% market share in seasonings and 16% in convenience food. The premiumization of these categories and the expansion in beverages and home & personal care products support durable mid-teen earnings growth. Synergy with retailer Wincommerce boosts distribution strength across both GT and MT channels.
catalysts: Direct-to-retailer initiatives accelerating revenue of beverages and HPC.
Revenue bouncing back strong YoY in Q2–Q4 2026.
risks: GT disruptions due to presumptive tax removal.
